name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the prompt-tuner template: the system prompt and a sample input as prose, the filled preview output, and a variable legend plus quality metrics. The agent renders the variables and metrics arrays to lists before substitution.

slots.description: The system prompt, shown in a fenced block.
A representative input the prompt is tuned against.
The filled prompt / model output preview.
Variable name. Repeat the variable row once per entry in the variables array (see shape).
Quality metrics, rendered as a bullet list.
